content.verdict: Zemi Beach House sits on the legendary Shoal Bay East — Anguilla's most photographed snorkeling beach, two miles of powder sand on the northeast coast with a healthy reef offshore. Opened in 2016 and now part of Hilton's LXR Hotels & Resorts collection, Zemi is a 76-suite contemporary boutique that combines Caribbean colonial architecture with a serious wellness programme — the spa is built around a 300-year-old Thai temple imported and reassembled on the property, the largest spa on Anguilla and one of the most distinctive in the Caribbean. The architecture is colonial-meets-modern: white-painted plantation shutters, dark wood, four-poster beds, and a long beachfront pool that runs the length of the property. The signature restaurant is Stone — a Caribbean-tasting-menu fine-diner — and the Rhum Room is the most serious rum bar on the island with 200+ bottles. For honeymoon couples who want Shoal Bay East access (the snorkeling is the best on Anguilla), a serious wellness focus, and a more contemporary design language than Cap Juluca's traditional moorish architecture, Zemi is the strongest pick. The price point sits below Cap Juluca and Four Seasons, putting it in the same band as Quintessence and Aurora — the smart middle of Anguilla's ultra-luxury market.
content.best_room: The One-Bedroom Beachfront Suite with Plunge Pool is the canonical Zemi honeymoon room — a 1,300-square-foot suite directly on Shoal Bay East with a private plunge pool on the terrace, four-poster bed, and steps to the powder sand. For ultimate luxury, the Three-Bedroom Beachfront Penthouse Residence (rentable per-bedroom) offers a rooftop terrace with private pool and 360-degree Shoal Bay views — the apex Zemi accommodation.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival via SXM at Shoal Bay East
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into Sint Maarten (SXM) and connect via 7-minute private charter to AXA. Zemi is a 25-minute resort transfer to Shoal Bay East on the northeast coast. Welcome at the colonial-style lobby, first afternoon on Shoal Bay's two-mile powder sand, sunset cocktails at the Rhum Room (200+ bottles, the island's best rum selection), dinner at Stone — chef's Caribbean tasting menu.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Shoal Bay Snorkel & Spa
itinerary_7_nights.description: Shoal Bay East has the best snorkeling reef on Anguilla directly offshore — morning snorkel from the beach with sea turtles, tropical fish, and the offshore patch reef. Lunch at Uncle Ernie's BBQ or Gwen's Reggae Grill (both legendary Shoal Bay beach shacks). Afternoon spa treatment at the 300-year-old Thai temple spa — the most distinctive spa space in the Caribbean. Dinner at Stone.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sandy Island & Sandy Ground
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat charter (15 minutes from Sandy Ground) to Sandy Island for the iconic offshore sandbar lobster lunch. Return mid-afternoon to explore Sandy Ground — Anguilla's nightlife hub (such as it is) with the Pumphouse and a handful of restaurants. Evening at Veya in Sandy Ground — chef Carrie Bogar's tasting menu, consistently the top-rated Anguilla restaurant on TripAdvisor.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Prickly Pear Catamaran
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day catamaran charter from Sandy Ground to Prickly Pear Cays — two uninhabited offshore islands with the clearest snorkeling in Anguilla. Johnno's or Calypso run full-day trips with grilled lobster lunch on the beach. Return for sunset cocktails at the Zemi Rhum Room and dinner at Stone.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Hibernia & Maundays Bay
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive 10 minutes from Zemi to Hibernia in Island Harbour — chef Raoul Rodriguez's Asian-Caribbean fusion lunch in his garden gallery. Afternoon drive across to Maundays Bay (the Cap Juluca beach) for cocktails on the powder sand, then return to Shoal Bay for dinner at Stone or a private chef's-table experience.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sunset at Sunshine Shack
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning on Shoal Bay East with the snorkel reef in front of the hotel. Drive 25 minutes to Bankie Banx's Dune Preserve and Garvey's Sunshine Shack on Rendezvous Bay — the legendary reggae-rum-and-ribs sunset shack. Return to Zemi for the final dinner at Stone with paired wines.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Final Morning & Departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final breakfast on the Zemi beachfront, last snorkel from the Shoal Bay reef. Zemi arranges the 25-minute transfer to AXA for the charter back to SXM. Build a 2-3 hour buffer for international onward connections.

caveats: Shoal Bay East has public beach shacks and day-trippers — the beach itself is shared (not private), unlike Maundays Bay (Cap Juluca) or Long Bay (Quintessence).
Many Anguilla restaurants close Monday and Tuesday in low season — Stone stays open but plan off-property dining ahead.
Hurricane risk peaks August-September; Zemi typically stays open but verifies storm risk for late-summer bookings.
All flights connect via SXM with a 7-minute charter or 25-minute ferry; Zemi is the furthest east property on Anguilla so add 25 minutes for ground transfer.
content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon inquiry — Zemi Beach House

Dear Reservations team,

We are planning our honeymoon [DATE]-[DATE] and are interested in a One-Bedroom Beachfront Suite with Plunge Pool on Shoal Bay East. Please advise on availability, honeymoon packages, Stone tasting menu reservations, and Thai temple spa couples' treatment options.

Thank you,
[Your names]

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Zemi Beach House is among the top three honeymoon picks on Anguilla — Shoal Bay East beach access (the best snorkeling on the island), a 300-year-old Thai temple spa, the Rhum Room's 200+ bottle list, and a contemporary design language that contrasts with Cap Juluca's traditional architecture. Honeymooners are the dominant guest category.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: December through April is peak — sunny, dry, and trade-wind-cooled. May and June are excellent shoulder months with warm water. November reopens the season. Avoid August-October peak hurricane season; the resort verifies storm risk for September bookings.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: Beachfront Suites with Plunge Pool book 4-6 months ahead for December-March. The Penthouse Residences book 8-12 months ahead and only at peak. Email reservations directly mentioning honeymoon — Zemi has a dedicated honeymoon package with a Thai temple spa couples' treatment included.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: Zemi welcomes families but the contemporary design, the wellness focus, and the rum-bar atmosphere skew heavily adult. The Beachfront Suites and Penthouse Residences are dominated by couples and honeymooners year-round outside the peak family weeks.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: The One-Bedroom Beachfront Suite with Plunge Pool is the essential Zemi honeymoon experience — direct steps to Shoal Bay East, private plunge pool on the terrace, 1,300 square feet of contemporary-Caribbean design. For maximum splurge, a per-bedroom Penthouse Residence with rooftop pool is the apex option.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: All international flights connect via Sint Maarten (SXM). From SXM choose between a 25-minute public ferry from Marigot or a 7-minute private charter via Tradewind, Anguilla Air Services, or Calypso Charters. Zemi arranges the 25-minute ground transfer from AXA Clayton Lloyd to Shoal Bay East.
